item.title: The Iran war's economic hit could linger through 2026, economists say
item.description: Economists say Americans should expect elevated prices at the pump and rising grocery costs in the months to come.

item.title: Trump extends Jones Act waiver for another 90 days
item.description: The waiver lets international ships carry goods between U.S. ports and is aimed at lowering energy prices.

item.title: Teen arrested in deadly shooting at Mall of Louisiana
item.description: Police said the shooting appeared to have happened after two groups of people got into an argument in the mall's food court.

item.title: Johnson & Johnson to launch on TrumpRx with 4 of its prescription drugs
item.description: Drug-making giant Johnson & Johnson will officially start marketing four of its medications on the Trump administration's TrumpRx websiteâ on Friday, ...

item.title: Witkoff, Kushner to head to Pakistan for new Iran peace talks
item.description: While the U.S. sends representatives to Islamabad, Israel's fight with Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.
